text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) sublingually as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (81 mg) by mouth once daily
Atorvastatin (as atorvastatin calcium) 20 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth twice daily
Apply one patch (291.667 microgram/hour) once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care
Assessment of health and social care needs

ul.li: Achieve remission or optimal control of prostate cancer as per oncology recommendations
Maintain or reduce PSA to target level as determined by oncology
Minimize urinary, pain, or other symptoms related to prostate cancer to improve quality of life
Patient will implement recommended lifestyle modifications to help control blood pressure.
Reduce the number of apnea and hypopnea events per hour of sleep to improve sleep quality and reduce cardiovascular risk.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
